template:
{{if .warranting}}### ✅ CusDec Warranting Completed

Your Customs Declaration (CusDec) has been successfully warranted.

* **Warrant Number**: `{{.warranting.warrant_number}}`
* **CusDec Number**: `{{.cusdec_number}}`{{else}}### Wait on CusDec Warranting

Your Customs Declaration (CusDec) **`{{.cusdec_number}}`** is currently pending warranting at the Customs Department.

Once the Customs Officers complete the warranting process, the Single Window will receive a notification and this step will advance automatically. No further action is required from you at this moment.{{end}}
